title: pinus pinea var. maderiensis
intro: Pinus pinea var. maderiensis, also known as Madeira Pine, is a variety of pine tree native to the island of Madeira, Portugal. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pinus pinea var. maderiensis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and protecting against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
